description: Frozen UniProtKB REST responses for the direct case-exact protein authority pass in Notebook 2 Step 1. One entry per pending base lookup-symbol; each value is the parsed {n, hits:[{acc, gene_names}]} the REQUERY branch (cell 4) writes. Consumed offline by is_caseexact_protein (cell 5).
rule: node is a protein iff a reviewed human entry has gene_names containing the CASE-EXACT raw symbol
regeneration_note: Re-frozen by the reproducibility specialist after the original db_responses/ folder was found absent from disk and git (see internal/CHANGELOG.md 2026-07-11T23:57Z). Regenerated via the cell-4 REQUERY logic against the live UniProt REST API; verified to reproduce cell-5's committed output exactly (174/183 case-exact; synonyms IKBKA/IL8/NFAT2; cAMP/ROS/cGMP rejected).
